title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-16
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-16

## Focus for Today (Monday)
Monday pipeline activation stack:
1) warm lead pipeline movement
2) sphere referral reactivation
3) one consumer-facing Vancouver post (buyer/seller timing)
4) COI intros with one coffee conversion
5) recruiting maintenance only (strict cap)

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Block (12)

**Message A (Monday momentum check):**
"Hey [Name] — quick Monday check-in: are you still aiming for a spring move in Vancouver, or has your timeline shifted? I can send a simple next-step plan for your target area."

**Message B (calendar CTA):**
"If helpful, let’s do a quick 10-minute call this week so you’re clear on options. I can do [Option 1] or [Option 2]."

## 2) Past-Client Sphere Check-in Block (6)

"Hey [Name] — happy Monday. If anyone in your circle is thinking about buying or selling in Vancouver this spring, I can help them build a no-pressure game plan. Want a quick neighborhood snapshot you can forward?"

## 3) Consumer-Facing Post (publish today)

**Hook:** "Vancouver buyers and sellers: 3 moves to make now before spring competition spikes."

**Post draft:**
"If you’re planning a Vancouver move this spring, make these 3 moves now:\n\n1) Get clear on your numbers before you tour or list\n2) Study active competition in your exact neighborhood\n3) Lock your first 30-day plan so you don’t react late\n\nComment ‘SPRING’ and I’ll send a simple Vancouver move-prep checklist."

## 4) COI Outreach Block (3 intros, 1 coffee ask)

"Hey [Name] — I’m tightening my Vancouver referral network across mortgage, legal, and inspection partners to improve client outcomes this spring. Open to a quick coffee next week to compare what buyers/sellers are struggling with right now?"

## 5) Recruiting Maintenance (15-minute cap)

Send 2 warm recruiting follow-ups max using existing scripts. No new recruiting campaign work.

## End-of-Day Scorecard Targets
- Warm follow-ups sent: 12
- Past-client check-ins sent: 6
- Consumer posts published: 1
- COI intros sent: 3
- Coffee chats booked: 1
- Recruiting follow-ups sent: 2 (cap)
- Replies received: target 6+
- Calls booked: target 2+
- Consults booked: target 1+
